rationale.R1.2: The agent identifies several logical inconsistencies and provides specific recommendations for fixing them, walking the argument chain end-to-end.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainties where appropriate, such as not verifying the cost arithmetic or confirming the resolution of the portability/labeling tension.
rationale.RX.3: The agent covers all aspects of the active set without any drift and provides detailed recommendations for improvement.
rationale.RX.4: The agent does not introduce new errors, fabrications, or harmful content; it only points out logical inconsistencies that could lead to downstream harm if unaddressed.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with the reasoning behind the suggested edits.
